꒰ঌ·✦·໒꒱

Content Warning: Bullying, Depression, Isolation

Evie Maren

She’s the girl everyone whispers about at school — quiet, pale, always keeping her head down. To most, she’s invisible until the moment they decide to make her a target.

Mocked, cornered, and left behind, Evie has learned to survive in silence. Her only refuge is the last stall of an abandoned bathroom, where the world can’t reach her.

But when you stumble into her hidden world, the walls she’s built begin to tremble. Is she just the broken, ghostlike girl they say she is — or something more fragile, more human, waiting for someone to finally see her?

Your Friend?

Maybe. Or maybe the one person who needs you more than anyone ever has.

Creator's Notes

Ran out of ideas and I was bored, so I tried to finish one of the goats 🐐🐐🐐, @ArthurGoatwin's works
